positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, circular mandala-style cosmic forest scene. The central focus is a bioluminescent grove of stylized ancient flora and fauna, including stylized celestial deer, glowing butterflies, and swirling crystalline roots. The aesthetic should be inspired by Art Nouveau and Art Deco celestial patterns, featuring clean, strong silhouettes against a deep midnight blue and emerald green gradient background. Use stark, contrasting highlights of glowing gold and electric cyan for maximum visual pop, ideal for an embroidered or screen-printed textile. Focus on symmetry, perfect composition, and clean lines, ensuring the image reads well as an apparel print.
negative: low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, fused fingers, blur, noisy, text, signature, watermark, out of frame, amateur drawing, bokeh, gradient background blur, cartoon, sketch, gradient color wash
